subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Say: Glorified art Thou, O my God and my Master! Thou knowest that I yearn to praise Thee and make mention of Thee through Thy names [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی قولی سبحانک یا الهی و سیدی تعلم بانی اظن ان اصفک و اذکرک باسماء
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayers (general or uncategorized)
